subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Blessed art thou and thy brother who migrated unto God until he attained unto the seat of His glorious throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله طوبی لک و لاخیک الذی هاجر الی الله الی ان دخل مقر عرش عظیم و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
